Important Notice

Dear valued customers, clients, and partners, we regret to inform you that our office phone lines are currently experiencing technical difficulties. As a result, we cannot be reached at our regular phone numbers.

However, we can still assist you by calling us at the alternative number 876-577-8962

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your patience as we work to resolve this issue.

Thank you for your understanding and continued support.

02

ANDREW ISSA

AGENCY BROKER

Andrew Issa, Lead Broker and Managing Director of Coldwell Banker Jamaica Realty (CBJR) brings over 30 years of real estate experience to his role, guiding CBJR to regional prominence since its 2001 inception.

He is a licensed Real Estate Broker and member of the Jamaica Real Estate Association and Jamaica MLS, with expertise and extensive knowledge of the island's real estate landscape, from large-scale developments to low-end new constructions.

The company operates out of two main offices located in Kingston and Montego Bay, maintaining a steadfast commitment to leadership, excellence, and exceptional customer service—a legacy upheld by the Coldwell Banker brand for over 105 years.

DOWNLOAD OUR MOBILE HOME SEARCH APP

Since 1906, the Coldwell Banker® brand has represented an unparalleled commitment to professionalism and customer service in the real estate industry. Our rich heritage of experience, our unparalleled global network of over 100,000 real estate agents and representatives, and our industry-leading tools and services has helped make the dream of owning a home a reality for millions of families. Our website is a reflection of our belief in customer service and providing an exceptional real estate experience.
